info.title: Liz.Tool
info.description:
The dotnet-CLI-tool of the Liz-Tool - which helps to extract license-information from your solution/project
      aimed on a fast and correct process.

arguments.name: targetFile
arguments.description: The target file to analyze. Can be a solution (.sln) or a project (.csproj, .fsproj) file
